attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WDQL.BK_QUOTE_NUM, 
WDQL.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_NUM, 
WDQL.BK_PARENT_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_NUM, 
WDQL.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY, 
WDQL.PARENT_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY, 
WDQL.FULLFILLMENT_TYPE_CD, 
WDQL.SRC_REPORTED_UPLIFT_FACTOR_RT, 
WDQL.TOTAL_LINE_COST_USD_AMT, 
WDQL.DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_DESCR, 
WDQL.SOURCE_CREATED_DTM, 
WDQL.SOURCE_UPDATED_DTM, 
WDQL.SOURCE_QUOTE_LINE_TYPE_CD, 
WDQL.EXPECTED_QTY, 
WDQL.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT, 
WDQL.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_GPL_USD_AM, 
WDQL.FINAL_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT, 
WDQL.EXPECTED_DURATION_CNT, 
WDQL.MLB_IND_FLG, 
WDQL.ACTIVE_FLG, 
WDQL.SOURCE_CREATED_BY_USER_ID, 
WDQL.SOURCE_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID, 
WDQL.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID, 
WDQL.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID, 
WDQL.PRODUCT_KEY, 
WDQL.SK_QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID_INT, 
WDQL.RU_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD, 
WDQL.RU_ADJUSTMENT_USD_AMT, 
WDQL.NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT, 
WDQL.PROMITIONAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT, 
WDQL.TRADE_IN_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT, 
WDQL.MULTI_YEAR_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT, 
WDQL.CONTRACTUAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT, 
WDQL.WEB_ORDER_ID, 
WDQL.DEAL_QUOTE_LN_ORD_STATUS_CD, 
WDQL.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
WDQL.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
WDQL.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
WDQL.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
WDQL.WATERFALL_PRICING_FLG, 
WDQL.EP_SMT_LINE_ID_INT, 
WDQL.SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER_CD, 
WDQL.NEGO_ADJSTD_DSCNT_USD_AMT, 
WDQL.EXTD_NET_PRICE_STD_USD_AMT, 
WDQL.EXTD_NET_PRICE_STD_LOCAL_AMT, 
WDQL.ADDTNL_CREDIT_USD_AMT, 
WDQL.TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_USD_AMT, 
WDQL.SOURCE_QUOTE_LINE_SUBTYPE_CD ,
WDQL.OEM_REBATE_FLG,
WDQL.BK_AS_PROJECT_CD, 
WDQL.SERVICE_PROGRAM_DESCR, 
WDQL.ADDTNL_INFO_CMNT,
WDQL.NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT_PCT,
WDQL.STANDARD_DISCOUNT_PCT ,
WDQL.SRC_PROGRAM_ID_INT,
WDQL.ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
WDQL.GLOBAL_PRC_LIST_EXTEND_USD_PRC,
WDQL.TOTAL_PURCHAS_ADJ_CRDT_USD_AMT,
WDQL.UI_HIDE_FLG,
WDQL.SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
WDQL.PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
WDQL.CHARGE_TYPE_NM,
WDQL.INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
WDQL.REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
WDQL.ACTION_TAG_NM,
WDQL.AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
WDQL.BILLING_MODEL_NM,
WDQL.PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
WDQL.RATE_TABLE_NM,
WDQL.RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
WDQL.SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
WDQL.SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
WDQL.SUBSCRIPTION_START_DT,
WDQL.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NM,
WDQL.USAGE_QTY,
WDQL.SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
WDQL.SS_CODE,
WDQL.REQUESTED_START_DT,
WDQL.REQUESTED_END_DT,
WDQL.MAGIC_KEY_ID, --2 col aug_2024 REL
WDQL.MONTHLY_RECURRING_USD_AMT,
WDQL.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
WDQL.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
WDQL.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
WDQL.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,
WDQL.AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_NM,
WDQL.INSTANCE_ID,
WDQL.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
FROM $$WORKDB.W_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_RNWL WDQL WHERE
SOURCE_QUOTE_LINE_SUBTYPE_CD<> 'PRODUCT_DEALPRICING_ADJUSTMENT'
     WHERE NOT EXISTS 
	  ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE NDQL 
WHERE WDQL.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY= NDQL.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY)
